VStack.Text: A complete tour of every node and meta element in the @slideglance/builder declarative slide DSL — rendered as a print-style A4 deck with the source XML, the rendered output, and the full attribute table for every node.

Use.title: 7 signature palettes
Use.body: Coral · forest · cream · peach · mint · yellow · mustard.

Use.title: Table of contents
Use.lede: Each chapter pairs an annotated XML source with the rendered output, plus a complete attribute table for the node family it covers.

Foreach.items: [ {"k":"01","v":"Stack containers — VStack · HStack · Layer · base attributes"}, {"k":"02","v":"Text — display + inline runs (B / I / U / S / Mark / Span / A)"}, {"k":"03","v":"Lists — Ul · Ol · Li · marker controls"}, {"k":"04","v":"Image — sources, sizing, decorative flag"}, {"k":"05","v":"Icon & Svg — built-in catalogue + inline SVG"}, {"k":"06","v":"Shape & Line — preset shapes, connectors, arrows"}, {"k":"07","v":"Table — Col · Tr · Td, cellBorder, defaultRowHeight"}, {"k":"08","v":"Chart — bar · line · pie · area · radar · doughnut"} ]

[ {"k":"09","v":"Diagrams · sequences (pipeline, milestone strip, vertical timeline)"}, {"k":"10","v":"Diagrams · hierarchies (tree, org chart, pyramid)"}, {"k":"11","v":"Diagrams · flow (decision, swimlane, vertical pipeline)"}, {"k":"12","v":"Diagrams · matrix & comparison"}, {"k":"13","v":"Recipes — KPIs, callouts, chips, swatches, steps"}, {"k":"14","v":"Templates / Styles / Imports — composition mechanics"}, {"k":"15","v":"Master, Notes, presentation-level options"}, {"k":"16","v":"Control flow — If, Choose / When / Otherwise, Foreach"}, {"k":"--","v":"Total: 17 chapters · 50+ pages · all primitive nodes"} ]

Use.title: Surface cards do the heavy lifting.
Use.body: Brand voltage lives in full-bleed coral, forest, dark, and cream surfaces — never in atmospheric gradients.

Use.title: White canvas. Modest weights.
Use.body: Display headlines stay at weight 400. Emphasis comes from size and signature surface contrast, not from boldness.

Use.title: Canvas resets between every signature surface.
Use.body: White → coral → white → cream → dark → white. Two whites in a row read as a typography blog.

Use.title: The 7 palettes, the type ramp, and the rhythm grid
Use.lede: Every page in the deck draws from this token table. Palette swatches map 1:1 onto the Airtable .design.md frontmatter; type sizes scale to A4 portrait.

Foreach.items: [ {"token":"display-xl","size":"32","bold":"true","lh":"1.05","sample":"Aa Bb Cc","meta":"48 / 500 · chapter covers"}, {"token":"display-lg","size":"28","bold":"false","lh":"1.1","sample":"Aa Bb Cc","meta":"40 / 400 · page hero"}, {"token":"display-md","size":"22","bold":"false","lh":"1.15","sample":"Aa Bb Cc","meta":"32 / 400 · signature card h2"}, {"token":"title-lg","size":"18","bold":"true","lh":"1.2","sample":"Aa Bb Cc","meta":"24 / 500 · section heads"}, {"token":"title-sm","size":"14","bold":"true","lh":"1.2","sample":"Aa Bb Cc","meta":"18 / 500 · card titles"}, {"token":"body","size":"13","bold":"false","lh":"1.25","sample":"The quick brown fox.","meta":"13 / 400 · running text"}, {"token":"caption","size":"11","bold":"true","lh":"1.25","sample":"CAPTION · META","meta":"11 / 500 · meta"} ]

[ {"k":"xxs","v":"4 · atomic gap"}, {"k":"xs","v":"8 · chip padding"}, {"k":"sm","v":"12 · code box padding"}, {"k":"md","v":"16 · demo card padding"}, {"k":"lg","v":"24 · cream callout padding"}, {"k":"xl","v":"32 · feature card padding"}, {"k":"xxl","v":"48 · signature padding"}, {"k":"sec","v":"96 · section rhythm"} ]
